sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالفَوَاكِهِ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِحَيَاةٍ صِحِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje povrća i voća je veoma važno za zdrav život.
sentences.translationEn: Eating vegetables and fruits is very important for a healthy life.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَحْتَوِي عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ تَحْمِي الجِسْمَ مِنَ الأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Oni sadrže mnogo vitamina koji štite tijelo od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: They contain many vitamins that protect the body from diseases.

sentences.arabic: تُحَضِّرُ أُمِّي لَنَا سَلَطَةً طَازَجَةً كُلَّ غَدَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Moja majka nam priprema svježu salatu uz svaki ručak.
sentences.translationEn: My mother prepares a fresh salad for us every lunch.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا تَجَنُّبُ أَكْلِ السُّكَّرِ الكَثِيرِ وَالوَجَبَاتِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo izbjegavati prekomjerno konzumiranje šećera i brze hrane.
sentences.translationEn: We must avoid eating too much sugar and fast food.
